results.rendered_html:
abhy-ā-√1. dā Ā. (rarely P.  Hariv. ) to seize, snatch away, (Pot. -dadīta),  MBh. i, 3558  = xii, 10999  = xiii, 4985  :
Ā. to put on (as a wreath),  Hariv. ;
(with vākyam) to take up the word, commence to speak,  MBh. v, 3384.

results.rendered_html:
abhyādā 3 A.
1 To take, seize, snatch.
2 To put on, wear (garland &c.).
3 To take up (the conversation), to commence speaking (after another).
